name: Scrambled Tofu and Corn
recipeIngredient: 3 cups fresh or frozen sweet corn, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tbsp of water in a pot.
2. Add the crumbled tofu to the pot and stir until evenly distributed.
3. Add the sweet corn (fresh or thawed) on top of the tofu.
4. Sprinkle with sea salt to taste.
5. Cover the pot and cook over low heat for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Once the tofu has cooled enough for safe handling, mix in the sliced scallions.
7. Serve immediately.
